p016.png.title: POLE
p016.png.raw_text_summary: BASI Pole section intro page with instructor photo

p017.png.title: Shoulder Stretch

exercises.name: Shoulder Stretch
exercises.notes: Maintain trunk stabilization; keep head aligned with spine; straighten arms completely before lowering.

p017.png.raw_text_summary: Shoulder Stretch with Pole, Fundamental level, Stretches block

p023.png.raw_text_summary: breathing exceptions and posture tips notes

p018.png.title: Overhead Stretch

exercises.name: Overhead Stretch
exercises.notes: Maintain trunk stabilization; keep shoulders moving evenly as Pole is taken overhead.

p018.png.raw_text_summary: Pole Series Overhead Stretch fundamental level stretches

p021.png.title: PED-a-PUL
p021.png.raw_text_summary: PED-a-PUL apparatus introduction page with instructor photo

p020.png.title: Spine Twist

exercises.name: Spine Twist
exercises.notes: Rotate trunk to each side with 2 pulses, alternating sides; spinal rotator control with stable pelvis.

p020.png.raw_text_summary: Spine Twist Pole Series fundamental stretches exercise detail

p019.png.title: Side Stretch

exercises.name: Side Stretch
exercises.notes: Arc trunk sideways; alternate sides; starting in Shoulder Stretch position with pole resting on shoulders, arms straight in T position.

p019.png.raw_text_summary: Side Stretch Pole Series, Fundamental level, lateral flexion

p022.png.title: Extension

exercises.name: Extension
exercises.notes: Standing or sitting, trunk in neutral spine, arms straight and parallel at shoulder height, palms facing down; exhale lower arms to sides, inhale return.

p022.png.raw_text_summary: Extension arm exercise sitting/standing series fundamental level

p028.png.title: F2 CHAIR
p028.png.raw_text_summary: F2 Chair introductory page with instructor photo

p026.png.title: Circles Down

exercises.name: Circles Down
exercises.notes: Starting in Extension; lower arms to sides, rotate arms, palms face body, lift to T position, move arms forward, return to start.

p026.png.raw_text_summary: Circles Down arm work fundamental level exercise detail

p027.png.title: Triceps

exercises.name: Triceps
exercises.notes: Starting in Extension, arms by sides; keep elbows pressing against sides of body

p027.png.raw_text_summary: Triceps arm work fundamental level cadillac exercise

p025.png.title: Circles Up

exercises.name: Circles Up
exercises.notes: Starting in Extension, arms in T position, palms facing down; lower arms to sides rotating palms back, then lift and return to T position.

p025.png.raw_text_summary: Circles Up arm exercise, fundamental level, cadillac standing

p024.png.title: Adduction

exercises.name: Adduction
exercises.notes: Starting in Extension arms in T position, palms facing down; exhale lower arms, inhale return.

p024.png.raw_text_summary: Adduction arm work fundamental level cadillac exercise

p030.png.title: Mini Roll-Up

exercises.name: Mini Roll-Up
exercises.notes: Chest Lift position maintained; spinal flexor control and trunk stabilization focus

p030.png.raw_text_summary: Mini Roll-Up on Wunda Chair, Fundamental level

p029.png.title: Roll-Up with Extension

exercises.name: Roll-Up with Extension
exercises.spring_setting: Y/S, Socket T, Lever Orientation 0, Lever Length 1, Lever Direction 7, Connector C
exercises.notes: Sitting upright, legs straight and together, feet plantarflexed; exhale roll down extend thoracic spine over Box, inhale pause and roll up with chest lift, exhale roll up return to start, inhale pause.

p029.png.raw_text_summary: Roll-Up with Extension on Wunda Chair, Intermediate level

p031.png.title: Mini Roll-Up Oblique

exercises.name: Mini Roll-Up Oblique
exercises.notes: Rotate trunk to right, Chest Lift with Rotation position; change sides after 5 repetitions

p031.png.raw_text_summary: Mini Roll-Up Oblique warm-up abdominal work intermediate

p033.png.title: Biceps

exercises.name: Biceps
exercises.notes: Set up in Chest Expansion position, arms straight and forward, shoulder height, palms facing up; Exhale bend arms, Inhale straighten arms.

p033.png.raw_text_summary: Biceps exercise, Arm Sitting Series, Fundamental level

p034.png.title: Rhomboids 1

exercises.name: Rhomboids 1
exercises.notes: Exhale: Move elbows back bending arms; Inhale: Straighten arms, return to start position. Muscle focus: Shoulder horizontal abductors, Elbow flexors.

p034.png.raw_text_summary: Reformer Arms Sitting Series Rhomboids 1 Fundamental level

p032.png.title: Chest Expansion

exercises.name: Chest Expansion
exercises.spring_setting: Y/S, Socket T, Lever Orientation 0, Lever Length 1, Lever Direction 3, Connector C
exercises.notes: Sitting upright on Box, facing Chair, legs hip width apart, feet on floor between Chair and Box, arms straight and forward of trunk, hands holding handles, palms facing back

p032.png.raw_text_summary: Chest Expansion on Wunda Chair, Arms Sitting Series

p035.png.title: Rhomboids 2

exercises.name: Rhomboids 2
exercises.notes: 팔꿈치는 열리는 모이기; 전대 승로 반세(x)

p035.png.raw_text_summary: Rhomboids 2 Arms Sitting Series Arm Work Intermediate

p036.png.title: Hug-a-Tree

exercises.name: Hug-a-Tree
exercises.notes: Sitting upright, arms in T position, move arms forward and back; focus on shoulder horizontal adductors and scapular stabilizers.

p036.png.raw_text_summary: Hug-a-Tree arm exercise on Wunda Chair, Fundamental level

p037.png.title: Salute

exercises.name: Salute
exercises.notes: Starting in Hug-a-Tree position, arms bent, hands holding handles, in line with eyes, fists facing forward; exhale straighten arms on diagonal line, inhale return.

p037.png.raw_text_summary: Salute exercise, Arms Sitting Series, Fundamental level

p038.png.title: WUNDA CHAIR
p038.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair section intro page with instructor image

p039.png.title: Parallel Heels

exercises.name: Parallel Heels
exercises.notes: Sitting upright, straighten legs as far as possible on exhale, bend on inhale; focus on knee extensors and trunk stabilization.

p039.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair Sitting Series Parallel Heels Foot Work Fundamental

p040.png.title: Parallel Toes

exercises.name: Parallel Toes
exercises.notes: Sitting upright, legs parallel, toes on pedal, hip width apart; exhale straighten legs, inhale bend legs.

p040.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair Foot Work - Parallel Toes Sitting Series Fundamental

p041.png.title: V-Position Toes

exercises.name: V-Position Toes
exercises.notes: Sitting upright, legs externally rotated, toes on pedal, heels together in small V position; resistance medium to heavy.

p041.png.raw_text_summary: V-Position Toes on Wunda Chair, Foot Work Fundamental

p042.png.title: Open V-Position Heels

exercises.name: Open V-Position Heels
exercises.notes: Sitting upright, legs externally rotated, heels on pedal in wide V position; exhale straighten legs, inhale return.

p042.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair Open V-Position Heels Sitting Series Foot Work

p043.png.title: Open V-Position Toes

exercises.name: Open V-Position Toes
exercises.notes: Sitting upright, legs externally rotated, toes on pedal in wide V position; resistance medium to heavy.

p043.png.raw_text_summary: Open V-Position Toes on Wunda Chair, Fundamental level

p045.png.title: Single Leg Heel Sitting Series

exercises.name: Single Leg Heel Sitting Series
exercises.notes: Fundamental level; resistance medium; avoid trunk rotation; keep working foot dorsiflexed and stable

p045.png.raw_text_summary: Single Leg Heel Sitting Series on Wunda Chair

p044.png.title: Calf Raises

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.notes: Standing in front of Wunda Chair, toes on pedal, knee anchored on front of Chair, back leg straight, heel reaching toward floor.

p044.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair Calf Raises Sitting Series Foot Work Fundamental

p046.png.title: Single Leg Toes

exercises.name: Single Leg Toes
exercises.notes: Sitting upright, toes on pedal, other leg straight and horizontal, foot plantarflexed; exhale to straighten leg, inhale to return.

p046.png.raw_text_summary: Single Leg Toes sitting series on Wunda Chair fundamental

p047.png.title: Pike Standing

exercises.name: Pike Standing
exercises.notes: Spinal flexor control with scapular stabilization; roll down placing hands on pedal, shoulders over wrists, lower pedal to base of Chair.

p047.png.raw_text_summary: Pike Standing on Wunda Chair, Fundamental level abdominal work

p049.png.title: Leg Press Standing

exercises.name: Leg Press Standing
exercises.notes: Standing in front of Wunda Chair, one foot on pedal plantarflexed, arms in T position; exhale bend leg and straighten down, inhale bend and straighten forward.

p049.png.raw_text_summary: Wunda Chair Leg Press Standing fundamental level exercise

p048.png.title: Pike Standing Reverse

exercises.name: Pike Standing Reverse
exercises.notes: Standing behind Wunda Chair, roll down placing hands on pedal, flatten trunk into neutral spine position; spinal flexor and extensor control focus.

p048.png.raw_text_summary: Pike Standing Reverse on Wunda Chair, Abdominal Work, Fundamental

p053.png.title: BASI Pilates Contact Page
p053.png.raw_text_summary: BASI Pilates logo and contact information page

p051.png.title: Swan

exercises.name: Swan
exercises.notes: Lying prone, hands on pedal, raise trunk on inhale, lower on exhale; spinal extensors focus.

p051.png.raw_text_summary: Swan back extension on Wunda Chair, fundamental level

p050.png.title: Side Stretch

exercises.name: Side Stretch
exercises.notes: Sitting sideways on Wunda Chair, one leg straight foot plantarflexed, other leg bent; arc trunk sideways lowering pedal on inhale, straighten and lift trunk raising pedal on exhale.

p050.png.raw_text_summary: Side Stretch on Wunda Chair, Lateral Flexion/Rotation, Fundamental
